assetMetadataHidden.viewerRule: Internal hero asset names and ids are filtered from viewer-facing title/subtitle text in sanitizeViewer mode.

heroViewerTextSource.A_heroTitle: config.heroTitle -> heroManagerConfig.heroTitle -> heroStoryTitle -> viewer title when story is published
heroViewerTextSource.B_heroSubtitle: config.heroSubtitle -> heroManagerConfig.heroSubtitle -> heroStorySubtitle -> viewer subtitle when story is published
heroViewerTextSource.C_heroDescription: config.heroDescription -> heroManagerConfig.heroDescription -> heroStoryDescription -> viewer description when story is published
heroViewerTextSource.D_assetTitle: asset.title populates carousel slide title for non-published/internal slide context; published story now overrides with editorial heroTitle
heroViewerTextSource.E_assetDescription: not used for viewer-facing hero text in current flow

publishedStoryWins.behavior: On Publish Story, viewer title/subtitle/description/badge source from heroLabel/heroTitle/heroSubtitle/heroDescription and no longer falls back to Hero Video/Hero Image naming.
